findings.title: Authentication Weakness Detected
findings.description: High-risk authentication weaknesses were identified, which could lead to unauthorized access to user accounts and sensitive data.
assumptions: Authentication mechanisms are not fully secure.

evidence.excerpt: Detected auth risk keywords in 3 source(s)

recommendations: Conduct a thorough security audit of the authentication flow and implement stronger authentication mechanisms.

metadata.mitigation: Implement stronger authentication mechanisms and conduct a security audit.

findings.title: Compliance Risk Identified
findings.description: High compliance risks related to data handling practices were detected, potentially violating GDPR and CCPA regulations.
assumptions: Data handling practices may not fully comply with regulations.

evidence.excerpt: Detected compliance risk keywords in 3 source(s)

recommendations: Conduct a legal review of data handling practices to ensure compliance with GDPR and CCPA.

metadata.mitigation: Conduct a legal review of data handling practices.

findings.title: Accessibility Compliance Gap
findings.description: The current implementation may not fully comply with WCAG AA standards, which could hinder access for users with disabilities.
assumptions: Accessibility features may not be fully implemented.

evidence.excerpt: Detected accessibility risk keywords in 1 source

recommendations: Review and enhance accessibility features to ensure compliance with WCAG AA standards.

metadata.mitigation: Enhance accessibility features to comply with WCAG AA standards.

summary: Identified 3 risks (1 accessibility, 1 compliance, 1 security). 2 flagged as blockers. Risk gate: FAILED (2 blockers, 0 warnings).
